ddls:
CREATE TABLE "surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey question */,
  "code" TEXT /* Code representing the survey question */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the categories table */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the groups table */,
  "response_type" TEXT /* Type of response (e.g., Yes/No, Rating, Open-ended) */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* The actual survey question text */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the survey was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the survey was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surveys_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surveys_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES groups ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response record */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the survey question it responds to */,
  "value" REAL /* Numerical value indicating the response */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year in which the survey was conducted */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date when the response was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the survey data */,
  "response_id" INTEGER /* ID of the response being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the response was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the response was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_response_id FOREIGN KEY ("response_id") REFERENCES responses ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "response_values" (
  "response_value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response value */,
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the responses table */,
  "value" TEXT /* Actual response value for open-ended questions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_response_values_response_id FOREIGN KEY ("response_id") REFERENCES responses ("response_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_questions" (
  "survey_question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey question */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the surveys table */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* The actual survey question text */,
  "question_order" INTEGER /* Order of the question in the survey */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_questions_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "response_types" (
  "response_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response type */,
  "response_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the response type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the response type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the change */,
  "response_id" INTEGER /* ID of the response being changed */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_time" TEXT /* Time when the change was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_response_id FOREIGN KEY ("response_id") REFERENCES responses ("response_id")
)
